item.title: MIUI OS3.0.315.0.WAACNXM Fastboot update for Redmi K90 Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K90 Max China

Codename: prague

Version: OS3.0.315.0.WAACNXM | 16.0

Size: 13.7 GB

MD5: a21290fd7ea156c2e8847fafbe04f85d

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability and user experience
Updated the security patch to June 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
